meaning: n.<美>短柄槌球(一种在硬地面上玩的游戏)
examples: My father, Don Roque, owns a national auto parts chain.
A sign announced the San Roque turnoff was a mile and a half ahead.
Rovers kept hold of striker Roque Santa Cruz in January despite overtures from Manchester City.
Agents are checking into the timing of Roque's flight to Cuba and how he got there.
